name: xeno-loop
description: Loop — an AI marketing co-pilot that closes the revenue loop (Xeno Mini CRM take-home).

scripts.dev: echo 'Run two terminals: npm run dev:crm  and  npm run dev:channel'
scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/crm run build && npm --workspace apps/channel-service run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace apps/crm run test --if-present && npm --workspace apps/channel-service run test --if-present
